extension.description: Orion v3.7.0 - Complete media addon with Netflix-style interface. BIG poster cards, cyan (#00D4FF) theme. Netflix-style views for History, Favorites, Continue Watching. Netflix-style Trakt integration. Netflix-style Settings panel. Season dropdown and episode grid. Master skin toggle in Settings to switch between Netflix and classic list view.
extension.news: [3.7.0] Netflix-style History, Favorites, Continue Watching grids. Netflix-style Settings panel. All views use proper poster art. Trakt fully skinned. Master skin toggle controls everything. [3.6.2] Wider poster tiles, SEASONS button fix, back navigation fix.
